name: Conversational Control Panel
tagline: Tell the assistant to enable a job, change its schedule, or trigger a run — without opening the dashboard.
description:
Built-in tool worker that gives the BFrost assistant a set of control functions: list jobs and their schedules, enable or disable any job, change a cron expression, or trigger an immediate run — all from a chat message.

This is a core infrastructure worker — it ships with every BFrost installation and cannot be removed.
author: @bfrost

versions.changelog: Ships with BFrost. No standalone install needed.
